productDisplayName: Skechers Women Blue & Green Sports Shoes
description: Style Noteskechers comes up with Pro Speed as a part of its Shape-Ups line and the brand promotes this shoe as a lightweight running shoe. Though not a technical running shoe, the attractive design alone is enough to capture hearts, not to mention its a futuristic shoe packed with features! One such innovative feature is a Velcro tongue lock that prevents the padded tongue from moving even during long runs. The USP of this shoe is a Smart Shoe Mid-Foot Strike design that aids the running gait. Bottom line is that this is a great lightweight running shoe that doubles up as an everyday trainer. Comes with a DVD and an instruction booklet.Product DetailsMesh and synthetic upper with a padded tongue and mesh innerHas central lace-ups with a Velcro closure connecting the side of the tongue to the innerRemovable insole with brand patented Resalyte cushioningHas Resamax kinetic wedge technology to create a fluid stride which mimics a natural running gait by absorbing energy, minimizing imoact, creating resistance and maximizing your workoutOptimum traction outsole made of high-abrasion, ultra-light rubber outsoleMaterial and CareMesh, syntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
